dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Suchan Jang. The name echoed through the halls of Daehan University. Top of his class. Impeccable grades. A future as bright as his perfectly styled hair.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He was the epitome of success, the golden boy everyone admired. A life meticulously crafted, every detail polished to perfection.

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) Another perfect score. Another day closer to my future. Just maintain this pace, Suchan. Don't slip up.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ZZZZZ

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) A mosquito? In my apartment? Ugh, seriously?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SLAP!

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) Got it. Annoying little pest. Now, back to studying.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He didn't know that one tiny bite, one insignificant moment, would shatter his perfect world. He didn't know that the cheap 'Jungle Juice' insect repellent he'd bought on a whim was about to rewrite his very existence.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PSHHHHT!

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) What is this... burning sensation? My back... it feels like it's on fire!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RIP! (sound of skin tearing)

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: GAH! What the hell?!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE! POP! (bones shifting, skin stretching)

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) No... no, this can't be real. My back... something is growing out of my back!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FLUTTER! (a faint, papery sound)

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) Wings. I have... mosquito wings. This is a nightmare. A horrible, disgusting nightmare!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The next morning, Suchan Jang, the golden boy, woke up to a new reality. His reflection stared back, a stranger with a monstrous secret.

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) How am I supposed to go to class? How am I supposed to live like this? My life... it's over.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUMBLE (stomach growling unnaturally loud)

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) What is this hunger? This... craving? It's not for food. It's for... blood?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He tried to hide them, to suppress the monstrous appendages that now defined him. A bulky jacket, hunched shoulders, anything to conceal the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) Just act normal. Don't let anyone see. Don't let anyone know. My reputation... everything I worked for...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH (a slight movement under his jacket)

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) Damn it! Control yourself, Suchan! Don't let them twitch! One wrong move and it's all over.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world he knew was gone, replaced by a terrifying struggle for normalcy. But a creature like him couldn't stay hidden forever. Not when his instincts screamed for release.

dialogue.speaker: Suchan Jang
dialogue.line: (thought) I need to find answers. I need to fix this. Or I'll become nothing more than a monster.

summary: Suchan Jang, a top university student, gets bitten by a mosquito and uses a mysterious 'Jungle Juice' repellent. This triggers a horrifying transformation, causing mosquito wings to erupt from his back. He struggles to hide his new monstrous form and suppress his terrifying new instincts, realizing his perfect life is shattered.
